title: Simple Mushroom Cooking
description: Ever just wanted to cook a good-damn mushroom? Look no further for now you can.
body:
Mushrooms aren't quite a common piece of loot. And, in addition, quite often they're utterly useless until you find their counterpart to make a bit of soup - which is hardly ever guaranteed. With this mod, though, you can just cook every mushroom you find to get cooked mushrooms that you can eat right away. Tasty!

[![Click here to join our discord!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c85f9c068f7691f8eee385f09b2bd43faa78ced0.png)](https://discord.gg/79zymr8mmB)
